markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's new proposal for the SchoolAI engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** The $18k/mo investment is underperforming due to poor traffic quality (teacher-focused content) and a lack of revenue impact, with zero deals opened in the Buster CRM.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [**Solution:** Pivot to a "quality over quantity" strategy, shifting from 10 articles/week to 5 high-impact pieces/week ($12k/wk) focused on the ICP (school administrators) to capture demand.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [**Measurement:** Success will be measured by deals opened in Buster, not just traffic. New Looker dashboards will track content's influence on signups and space launches.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Decision:** Nikki will review the proposal with the CRO today and provide a final decision by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)

## Topics

### Current State & Challenges

  - [**Performance Gaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
      - [**Traffic Quality:** Content attracts the wrong audience (teachers, not buyers).](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Revenue Impact:** Zero deals opened in Buster CRM from GrowthX content.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [**Cost:** The $18k/mo investment is not justified by current results.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [**Technical SEO:**](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [**Visibility:** Declining visibility in AI answer engines.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [**Migration Risk:** Webflow migration poses a risk of losing SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)

### Proposed Solution: Strategic Pivot

  - [**Goal Alignment:** The strategy will align with SchoolAI's 3x business growth target, focusing on the new business portion (\~70% of the goal).](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [**New Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [**ICP Focus:** Shift from teachers to school administrators (buyers with budgets).](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
      - [**Full-Funnel Approach:** Map content to the buyer journey (Awareness → Consideration → Decision).](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
      - [**Content Mix:** Prioritize refreshes of high-potential existing content and create net-new pieces for strategic gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
      - [**Content Pruning:** Redirect or remove underperforming teacher-focused content to improve crawl budget and focus SEO authority.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [**Measurement & Funneling:**](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [**Primary Metric:** Deals opened in Buster CRM.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [**Secondary Metrics:** Track engaged sessions (time on page, pages per session) and user flow from blog to "money pages" in Google Analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
      - [**Tactics:** Use empathetic CTAs (e.g., newsletter signups) to nurture users, rather than pushing for immediate demos.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)

### Proposal Details

  - [**Pricing:** $12k/week for 5 high-impact editorial pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
      - [This is GrowthX's standard "editorial" package, offered to reflect the pivot to quality over quantity.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [**Scope:** Includes landing page optimization advice and full SEO support for the Webflow migration.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [**Webflow Migration Support:**](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
      - [**Pre-Migration Audit:** Identify risks and requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
      - [**Post-Migration Audit:** Verify redirects, fix broken links, and monitor indexation.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
      - [**Ongoing Monitoring:** Quarterly technical audits.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Proactive support is critical to prevent SEO value loss, as migrations often cause unexpected issues (e.g., Webflow's handling of trailing slashes).](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [**Optional Add-on:** Backlink building to core "money pages" to boost their demand-capture rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:** Add Nikki to the proposal deck.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [**Nikki:** Review the proposal with the CRO today.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
  - [**Nikki:** Provide a final decision by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/E5LqsCa9zCtjbCWv84EzKC-cKei5fzEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
